summary:
Prosopagnosia is a specific disorder affecting face recognition through vision, not auditory perception. It has no connection to deficiencies in listening or understanding spoken language; instead, individuals often use voices or other features as compensations without experiencing genuine auditory agnosia.  

$\boxed{\text{B}}$
